fh_freedom.name: Global Freedom score
fh_freedom.note: Aggregate of political rights & civil liberties (0–100). Higher = freer.

eq_lgbt.name: LGBT Legal Equality Index
eq_lgbt.note: Legal rights for LGBTQ+ people (0–100). Higher = more equal.

wbl_women.name: Women, Business and the Law Index
wbl_women.note: Laws affecting women's economic opportunity (0–100). Higher = more equal.
